_comment: AgentContextPack index (design-spec 2.10). Each `areas` entry feeds one generated <state_dir>/contextpacks/<name>.context.md: `name` (the area; slugified into the pack filename), `folio` (the canonical entry-point doc for the area), `binding_docs` (authoritative contracts to read first), `source_roots` (key files/dirs; existence-checked at generation, missing ones flagged), `do_not_create` (existing systems an agent must not duplicate), `gates` (currently active expansion conditions), `verification` (commands to run before pushing). The generator also accepts a manifest snapshot ({"subsystems": [...]}) instead of this file. Filled 2026-07-11 (P3, fm PR #86) — was the example-area template stub (centralization plan gap 5).

areas.name: records-custody
do_not_create: a second fleet roster/manifest — docs/roster.md is canonical (superbot docs/eap/fleet-manifest.md was superseded 2026-07-11)
a second owner queue — docs/owner-queue.md is the ONE deduplicated queue; the candidate feed is generated intake, never a queue
hand-edits to generated files (docs/roster.md, docs/owner-queue-candidates.md, docs/evidence-index.md) — edit the generator

areas.name: control-bus
do_not_create: a second order channel — control/inbox.md is one-writer/append-only
a shared claims list — control/claims/ is one-file-per-claim (0% conflict, measured)
